patch.value: Include package tests in release readiness and stop tracking generated pm runtime/search cache artifacts.
release:check runs tests; generated pm runtime/search artifacts are ignored and removed from git tracking; package release metadata remains valid

Added npm test to release:check, removed generated pm runtime/search artifacts from git tracking where present, updated ignore rules, and applied website no-runner/private package governance for pm-web.
Release readiness checks exercise tests and generated local pm caches are not tracked.
Package test sweep completed successfully; npm audit endpoint failures were isolated to registry responses rather than package test failures.
Release readiness hardening implemented and npm test passed for the package sweep.
